MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Complaint Against Plaintiffs J. Koscinski, C.B., D. Bracelin, K.B., And/Or J. Bracelin Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOTION OF PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY dba AT&T CALIFORNIA FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO COMPLAINT AGAINST PLAINTIFFS JADE KOSCINSKI, C.B., DALLAS BRACELIN, K.B., AND/OR JENNIFER BRACELIN OR, ALTERNATIVELY, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Pacific Bell Telephone Company moves for summary judgment on all claims brought against it by plaintiffs Jade Koscinski, Dallas Bracelin, Jennifer Bracelin, C.B., and K.B. The court uses plaintiffs' first names because they have common last names with each other and other parties in this case; the court intends no disrespect. The motion is unopposed and Pacific Bell carries its burden as the moving party of presenting evidence to show that there is no triable issue of material fact and it is entitled to judgment as a matter of law. Jade, Dallas, Jennifer, C.B., and K.B. have not opposed the motion and present no evidence showing a triable issue of fact. The motion is therefore granted, and Pacific Bell may present a judgment of dismissal as to the following claims: Jade, Dallas, Jennifer, C.B., and K.B.'s claims for negligence (first cause of action); negligent hiring, training, and supervision (second cause of action); and negligent infliction of emotional distress (fifth cause of action).

Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
